source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1924 photograph)
title: Icebergs, bay, and mountain in background, Alaska
description: 1899 Curtis photograph from the Harriman Alaska Expedition showing scattered icebergs on a bay with a snow-capped mountain backdrop — the same visual environment cruise passengers encounter at College Fjord today. Cropped from the LoC archival scan to remove the color calibration strip.
alt: Historical 1899 photograph of large icebergs scattered on a calm Alaska bay with snow-capped mountains in the background and misty clouds
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-10/11 image sourcing workflow; downloaded and cropped from tile.loc.gov
